name: @borjie/strategic-reports
description: PhD-grade strategic report engine for BORJIE. Composes acquisition / lifecycle / sustainability / expansion / green-angle advisors + user-context-store + multi-LLM synthesis + document-studio render + WORM audit into 10 typed report families (leasing financial, conditional survey, acquisition IC, disposition, refinancing, sustainability, expansion, tenant credit, rent-roll, annual estate operating review). Pure-functional core; injectable ports.
